title: USB 5 V to 3.3 V rail for a peripheral
prompt: My ATmega328 board runs on 5 V from USB, but I've added a 3.3 V peripheral that needs its own clean rail. Add a regulator that takes the 5 V input and gives a 3.3 V output rail. The ATmega itself still runs on 5 V. For the bench check verify the 3.3 V rail comes up.
